name: Roundleaf Los Angeles
description_short: Roundleaf Inc. offers debt settlement, management, and budgeting services to Los Angeles residents, with in-person consultations and live phone support since 2006.
description_long:
Roundleaf Inc. has been operating since 2006, positioning itself as a debt relief firm serving individuals, families, and business owners in the Los Angeles area. The company maintains a physical office at 1601 Vine St., 6th Floor, Los Angeles, CA 90028, and emphasizes local presence and accessibility as core differentiators in the debt relief space.

The company offers a range of debt-related services including debt settlement (negotiating reduced payoffs with creditors), debt management planning, personal and family budgeting, credit education and guidance, and wealth and resource planning. They explicitly position debt settlement as an alternative to bankruptcy and claim to help mediate negotiations with creditors to protect client interests and secure better settlement deals than consumers might achieve independently.

Roundleaf distinguishes itself through a "hands-on approach" that includes face-to-face consultations, live customer support (no automated systems), and quick response times via phone, email, or text. The company operates Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, with Saturday appointments available by separate phone number. They advertise free consultations and claim to customize solutions rather than using one-size-fits-all approaches.

However, the website provides limited transparency about pricing, specific success rates, or detailed methodology. While testimonials are positive, only one customer review is featured. The company's claims about debt settlement—particularly that they can negotiate significantly reduced payoffs—should be evaluated carefully, as debt settlement can have credit score impacts and may involve fees not clearly disclosed on the site. The business model for debt settlement companies typically relies on percentage-based fees from negotiated reductions, which creates potential conflicts of interest.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Local physical office in Los Angeles with in-person consultation capability
Live phone support with no automated systems or bots, available via phone, email, and text
Extended business hours Monday-Friday 9am-6pm with Saturday appointments available
Established company history since 2006 with claimed track record helping residents
Multiple service offerings beyond debt settlement including budgeting, credit education, and wealth planning
Advertises free consultations to assess eligibility and options
Positions debt settlement as alternative to bankruptcy with negotiation expertise
cons: Website does not disclose fee structure, pricing, or how much clients typically pay for services
Limited information about success rates, average settlement percentages, or outcomes for past clients
Only one customer testimonial provided despite claiming many satisfied clients; testimonial concerns about grammar suggest minimal vetting
Debt settlement services can negatively impact credit scores during the negotiation process, but this risk is not prominently disclosed
Website lacks detail on timeline expectations, how long debt settlement typically takes, or what happens if creditors refuse to settle
best_for: Los Angeles residents with $15,000+ in unsecured debt who want local, in-person debt relief consultation
Business owners facing company debt who need hands-on financial guidance and creditor negotiation
Consumers seeking debt settlement as an alternative to bankruptcy who prefer face-to-face communication
diagnosis: Roundleaf is best for Los Angeles-area residents with significant unsecured debt who prefer local, hands-on service and want to explore debt settlement as an alternative to bankruptcy. The primary caveat is that the website lacks transparency on fees, success rates, and credit score impacts—critical factors for evaluating whether debt settlement is appropriate for your situation.
services: Debt settlement (negotiating reduced payoffs with creditors)
In-person consultations at Los Angeles office
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1601 Vine St 6th floor, Los Angeles, CA 90028
